vllm.title: [bugfix][distributed] do not error if two processes do not agree on p2p capability
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The p2p test should not fail users' code. At the last resort (e.g.even  if the driver is broken), we can just regard this as p2p disabled.

vllm.bodyExcerpt: Remove test-template.j2 as test-template-aws.j2 should be used as default template now

vllm.title: [Misc] Add OpenTelemetry support
vllm.author: ronensc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds basic support for OpenTelemetry distributed tracing.
It includes changes to enable tracing functionality and improve monitoring capabilities.
I've also added a markdown with print-screens to guide users how to use this feature. You can find it here
FIX #3789
BEFORE SUBMITTING, PLEASE RE

vllm.title: [Misc] Add channel-wise quantization support for w8a8 dynamic per token activation quantization
vllm.author: dsikka
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:

Previously, the CompressedTensorsW8A8DynamicToken scheme only supported models with per-tensor weight quantization
This PR expands the scheme such that channel-wise quantization can be supported
No changes are required for the kernel

From Neural Magic

vllm.title: [ci] Setup Release pipeline and build release wheels with cache
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Start a new Release pipeline to handle release tasks with the first step is to build wheels for release
Changes to Dockerfile:

dev image is split into base image and dev image.
base image installs dependencies (python, pip, curl, sudo, requirements-cuda ...)
base image now installs specific Python

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix for inconsistent behaviour related to sampling and repetition penalties
vllm.author: tdoublep
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #5607
I tracked this down to the prompt_tokens and output_tokens within SamplingTensors having the wrong shape, and determined that the correct/incorrect behaviour depends on the order of the requests within the batch. I found that it was enough to reproduce this with just two concurrent reque

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix CUDA version check for mma warning suppression
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes the check for CUDA_VERSION to suppress warnings about mma.sp.sync.aligned as introduced in #5401.
On current main, there are still 10s of thousands of warnings printed when compiling marlin_24_cuda_kernel.cu on CUDA 12.5, and this finally fixed them.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Phi-3 Long RoPE scaling implementation
vllm.author: ShukantPal
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When evaluating our fine tunes of Phi-3, we noticed a big difference in the logits outputted by Huggingface transformers and vLLM.
The most significant cause of this was a deviation in the positional embedding implementation of vLLM. Since Microsoft contributed their Phi-3 implementation to Huggingf

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Added test for sampling repetition penalty bug.
vllm.author: tdoublep
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Adds test for #5607.
This is a follow-up to #5639 that adds a test-case to cover this issue, so we don't break it again in the future.
I have verified that it fails before the fix from #5639 and passes after.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][CI/Build][AMD][ROCm]Fixed the cmake build bug which generate garbage on certain devices
vllm.author: hongxiayang
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This pull request has the following changes:
(1) Fixed the cmake build bug which did not build correct kernels for various GPU targets. As a result, vllm generated garbage and impacted MI300x users.
(2) Refactor Dockerfile.rocm based on @WoosukKwon 's feedback.
